meaning: n.缁濈紭(鎴栭殧鐑強闅旈煶)鏉愭枡
examples: The insulant was burned for overheating.
The cold store can do business under capital repair. It is shown that PEF is a new excellent insulant which should be extended.
A suggestion was presented for strengthening research of non-halogen flame retardant in order to develop PP cable insulant with outstanding flame retardancy...
